rule-bi-read-only.description: BI module never writes to other module tables — read only via views or queries
rule-bi-read-only.condition: all BI operations are SELECT only

rule-kpi-query-must-be-parameterized.description: KPI query templates must use parameters, never hardcoded company IDs

rule-alert-cooldown.description: Alert rule cannot fire more than once per configured cooldown period
